meaning: 名古屋[日本本州岛中南岸港市]
examples: They beat Canada 4-1 in their last round-robin match at Nagoya in Japan.
Another team at Nagoya University in Japan has tested calcium compound as an energy storage material.
There are also two other Japanese cities that have made the top 10 list this year: Osaka and Nagoya.
The company is planning to move its headquarters to Nagoya from Tokyo in 2007.
With its castle and history, Nagoya is a more accessible tourist attraction than mountainous Nagano.
